close_reason: TypeScript deps cell generation would require npm/yarn wrapper with Buck2 worker integration. Most complex of the three.
description:
Create a Nix-based TypeScript/npm deps cell similar to godeps for Go.

Options to explore:
1. Use node2nix for package.json
2. Use dream2nix for modern npm/yarn/pnpm
3. Use npmlock2nix for package-lock.json
4. Build custom solution

The deps cell should:
- Parse package.json + lock file
- Fetch packages from npm registry
- Generate BUCK files for each package
- Handle TypeScript type definitions
- Support both native npm/node and buck2 run
title: TypeScript: deps cell generation from package.json
